layerzone.17: belowgrid "0 if hasattr(me, 'EncloseOPs') and me.EncloseOPs else 1"

Bodytext.67108945: "You may want to convert POP attributes to CHOPs and then get them back to POPs" "'You may want to convert POP attributes to CHOP channels and then get them back to POPs with the same attribute names, types and formats. But POP attributes have () and [], while CHOPs only allow _ in their names. So with Name Formatting set to Precise, channel names are formed in an unambiguous way to convert to CHOP names and back to POPs. \\n\\nYou can add a letter at the end to signify the numeric format: float, double integer, unsigned by setting the Type Format toggle.\\n\\nIn CHOP to POP, you can put * in the Attributes parameter and it will do its best to convert all channels.  Note Goof is a double3 attribute.'"
